nasb.text: “Therefore I will not restrain my mouth; I will speak in the anguish of my spirit, I will complain in the bitterness of my soul.

esv.text: “Therefore I will not restrain my mouth; I will speak in the anguish of my spirit; I will complain in the bitterness of my soul.

cnv.text: 因此，我不再禁止我的口， 我要說出靈裡的憂愁， 傾訴心中的痛苦。

ccb.text: “因此我不再缄默不语， 我要吐露胸中的悲愁， 倾诉心里的苦楚。
